ingredients.name_en: Cherries, stemmed, ripe or slightly wilted
ingredients.name_it: Ciliege mondate del gambo, ben mature o poco appassite

ingredients.note: OCR shows fractional part (likely 1/8); translation ambiguous

steps_en: Crush the cherries and separate out the whole pits.
Macerate the pulp with alcohol for two days.
Add the cherry laurel essential oil in the specified proportion and dissolve well.
notes_en: Numeric quantities taken from Italian OCR table; English translation garbled the essential oil proportion ('parts equal to quantities') which likely corresponds to a fractional amount (e.g. 1/8) in the original.
